Will not pay for this app until they fix one extremely annoying problem... Out of all the media apps I have, this is the ONLY app that overrides everything and insists on auto-playing music EVEN AFTER I CLOSE THE APP. I enter my car and SoundCloud insists on blaring music when the app is not even supposed to be opened. No other music/media app does this, when you close other apps-- they close and you can have peace. Why is this app continuously opening itself to play music when I CLOSED it?
